mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_friend_remark (owner_user_id, peer_user_id, remark) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{peerUserId}, #{remark}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE remark = VALUES(remark)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM social_friend_remark WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND peer_user_id = #{peerUserId}
